task_desc: Fix frame-count-based stimulus timers causing frame-rate-dependent drive accumulation, and fix feeding timer leak on behavior interruption -- (1) touchResetFrame and windResetFrame at main.js:1386-1397 use frameCount (incremented per RAF frame) to expire stimulus after 120 frames, but this makes stimulus duration inversely proportional to display refresh rate: ~1s at 120Hz, ~2s at 60Hz, ~4s at 30Hz; since BRAIN.updateDrives() adds fear (+0.3) and groom (+0.2) per 500ms brain tick while touch stimulus is active, a 120Hz user gets ~2 ticks of drive accumulation (fear 0.47) while a 30Hz user gets ~8 ticks (fear 0.89) from the same touch, producing measurably different behavioral responses and undermining the frame-rate-independence work from D1.1/D2.1/D3.2/D4.1; additionally, when the tab is backgrounded RAF pauses but setInterval(updateBrain, 500) continues (throttled to ~1/sec), so frameCount freezes and stimulus persists indefinitely while drives keep accumulating; fix by replacing frameCount-based expiry with Date.now()-based timestamps (e.g. touchResetTime = Date.now() + 2000, check Date.now() >= touchResetTime), which is wall-clock-correct regardless of frame rate or backgrounding; apply to all 7 sites that set touchResetFrame (main.js:343,1330,1334,1339,1343) and windResetFrame (main.js:275,307), and both reset checks (main.js:1386-1389,1393-1396), (2) gradual feeding timer at main.js:1355-1368 sets food[i].feedStart = Date.now() on first contact in feed state but only resets feedStart when the fly moves away (dist > 20 at line 1371 or dist > 50 at line 1378); if behavior changes from feed to a stationary state like groom (speed=0) while the fly is within 20px of food, feedStart is NOT reset because the dist <= 20 branch at line 1353 only enters the feeding block when behavior.current === 'feed' (line 1355) and otherwise falls through with no reset; when the fly re-enters feed state, elapsed = Date.now() - stale feedStart includes all non-feeding time, potentially exceeding feedDuration and instantly consuming the food; realistic trigger: feed->groom transition (groom threshold 8 is similar to feed threshold 8, groom has speed=0 so fly stays near food, groom lasts 2-5s); fix by resetting feedStart to 0 for all food items when behavior.current exits feed state in updateBehaviorState(), (3) two angle-normalization sites at main.js:505-506 (food-seeking angleDiffToFood) and main.js:1314-1315 (edge avoidance angleDiffEdge) use while loops instead of the O(1) normalizeAngle() helper at main.js:32-37; while functionally equivalent for numeric values, a while loop on NaN spins infinitely and freezes the browser tab; replace both with normalizeAngle() calls or inline modulo arithmetic. Files: js/main.js.
